name: semantic-scholar-mcp
description: Comprehensive MCP server for the Semantic Scholar Graph, Recommendations, and Datasets APIs. Provides 18 tools for paper search, citation graphs, author profiles, recommendations, and dataset access.

SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY.description: Optional. Raises rate limits and is required for dataset downloads. Request at https://www.semanticscholar.org/product/api#api-key
